requirements.statement: The customer portal must support passwordless login for enterprise users.
requirements.source_quote: The customer portal must support passwordless login for enterprise users.

requirements.statement: We need audit logs retained for at least seven years for regulated customers.
requirements.source_quote: We need audit logs retained for at least seven years for regulated customers.
constraints: We need audit logs retained for at least seven years for regulated customers.

requirements.statement: The system should export monthly billing reports in CSV format.
requirements.source_quote: The system should export monthly billing reports in CSV format.

requirements.statement: We require response time under two seconds for dashboard page loads.
requirements.source_quote: We require response time under two seconds for dashboard page loads.
constraints: We require response time under two seconds for dashboard page loads.

requirements.statement: The roadmap needs self-service role management for account administrators.
requirements.source_quote: The roadmap needs self-service role management for account administrators.

solutions.what: We implemented passwordless login using email magic links and FastAPI endpoints.
solutions.source_quote: We implemented passwordless login using email magic links and FastAPI endpoints.

solutions.what: Audit logging is built with Postgres tables and retention policies for seven years.
solutions.source_quote: Audit logging is built with Postgres tables and retention policies for seven years.

solutions.what: The billing service supports CSV export for monthly invoice reports.
solutions.source_quote: The billing service supports CSV export for monthly invoice reports.

solutions.what: Dashboard optimization is deferred until the next performance sprint.
solutions.source_quote: Dashboard optimization is deferred until the next performance sprint.
deferred: Dashboard optimization is deferred until the next performance sprint.

solutions.what: Role management is out of scope for this release and only read-only roles are included.
solutions.source_quote: Role management is out of scope for this release and only read-only roles are included.
scope_limits: Role management is out of scope for this release and only read-only roles are included.

gaps.requirement_statement: We require response time under two seconds for dashboard page loads.
evidence: No candidate solution was available for this requirement.
gaps.recommendation: Confirm ownership and add an engineering solution that explicitly covers this requirement.
